full_text:
Su Yu (Xiuyu) 蘇愉 (休豫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su Yu (蘇愉), styledXiuyu (休豫). Defeated at Mount Jin by warlord Tufa Shujineng, had better political luck. Su Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
